test_name: 089. Working in a summer camp in the USA

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 你将听到几段不同的录音，你需要回答关于所听到的内容的问题
content.en_text: [Narrator]: You will hear a number of different recordings, and you will have to answer questions on what

content.cn_text: 你所听到的。
content.en_text: you hear.

content.cn_text: 你将有时间阅读说明和问题，并且你将有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions, and you will have a chance to

content.cn_text: 检查你的答案。
content.en_text: check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音都只播放一次。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 测试分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four parts.

content.cn_text: 请将所有答案写在听力试题册上。
content.en_text: Write all your answers in the listening question booklet.

content.cn_text: 测试结束时，你将有十分钟时间将答案誊写到
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an

content.cn_text: 答题卡上。
content.en_text: answer sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到试题册第二页的第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to part one on page two of your question booklet.

content.cn_text: 第一部分
content.en_text: Part one

content.cn_text: 你将听到一个年轻人和一位中介的电话对话，这个年轻人想在美国找一份暑期工作。
content.en_text: You will hear a telephone conversation between a young man who wants to get a summer job in

content.cn_text: 这个年轻人想在美国找一份暑期工作。
content.en_text: the USA and an agent.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看问题一到五。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions one to five.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听并回答问题一到五。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions one to five.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 您好，这里是美国夏令营，我是尼古拉斯。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Hi, USA Summer Camps, Nicholas speaking.

content.cn_text: 有什么可以帮您的吗？
content.en_text: How can I help you?

content.cn_text: [男士]: 我想今年夏天在美国找份工作，我在你们网站上看到一个广告，上面说如果想了解更多信息，应该打这个电话。
content.en_text: [Man]: I want to get a job in the USA this summer, and I saw an advert on your website, and it said

content.cn_text: 我应该打这个电话。
content.en_text: I should call this number if I wanted more information.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Right.

content.cn_text: 那么，你对在夏令营工作感兴趣？
content.en_text: So, you're interested in working in a summer camp?

content.cn_text: [男士]: 那是和孩子们一起工作，对吗？
content.en_text: [Man]: That's working with children, is it?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Yes.

content.cn_text: 很多孩子去美国参加夏令营，我们正在招聘的职位是
content.en_text: Lots of children go away to summer camp in the USA, and the jobs we're advertising are

content.cn_text: 所谓的“辅导员”。
content.en_text: for what are called counselors.

content.cn_text: 这意味着你将全天候，24小时与孩子们在一起。
content.en_text: That means you're with the children the whole day, 24 hours.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Man]: Right.

content.cn_text: 那么，我具体要做些什么呢？
content.en_text: So, what did I be doing exactly?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 所有事情。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Everything.

content.cn_text: 你将和他们一起工作，一起玩耍，教他们所有东西。
content.en_text: You'd be working with them, playing with them, teaching them everything.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 你们的广告说有不同类型的职位，普通和专业的。
content.en_text: [Man]: Your ad said there were different sorts of positions, general and specialists.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Yes.

content.cn_text: 对于普通辅导员，他们要求有与儿童工作经验的人，
content.en_text: For the general counselors, they're asking for people who have experience of working with children,

content.cn_text: 但必须是某种形式的领导者经验。
content.en_text: but it has to be as a leader of some sort.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 我不确定我真正感兴趣的是体育。
content.en_text: [Man]: I'm not sure what I'm really interested in is sports.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 那么你可能对成为一名专业辅导员更感兴趣。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: You might be more interested in being a specialist counselor then.

content.cn_text: 他们专注于一个特定领域。
content.en_text: They focus on one particular area.

content.cn_text: 不一定是体育，但大多数情况下是。
content.en_text: It doesn't have to be a sport, but mostly it is.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 网球可以吗？
content.en_text: [Man]: Would tennis be okay for that?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 当然可以。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Absolutely.

content.cn_text: 不过你可能也会发现自己要指导其他运动。
content.en_text: You might find yourself coaching other sports as well though.

content.cn_text: 他们通常会涉及很多种类。
content.en_text: They do a big range usually.

content.cn_text: 这是大多数孩子感兴趣的，当然，很多都是户外活动。
content.en_text: That's what most of the kids are interested in, and of course, a lot of it's outdoor stuff.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 那么，他们对艺术之类的就不那么感兴趣了吗？
content.en_text: [Man]: So, they wouldn't be so interested in something like art?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 哦，不。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Oh, yes.

content.cn_text: 他们会感兴趣的。
content.en_text: They would be.

content.cn_text: 任何你热情投入并能帮助小孩子的事情都可以。
content.en_text: Anything you're enthusiastic about can help younger kids with.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Man]: Okay.

content.cn_text: 嗯，我对在这两个领域与孩子们一起工作真的很有兴趣。
content.en_text: Well, I'd be really interested in working with kids in both those areas.

content.cn_text: 现在，关于时间，广告说这份工作是12周。
content.en_text: Now, about times, the ad said the job was for 12 weeks.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 实际上是八周。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Eight, actually.

content.cn_text: 但大多数人会再在美国待三到四周去旅行。
content.en_text: But most people stay on in the US for another three or four weeks and go traveling.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Man]: Yeah.

content.cn_text: 我真的很想那样做。
content.en_text: I'd really like to do that.

content.cn_text: 美国有很多地方我想去看看。
content.en_text: There are lots of places I'd like to see in America.

content.cn_text: 那么，我什么时候需要去那里？
content.en_text: So, when would I need to be there?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 六月。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: June.

content.cn_text: 然后你一直工作到八月，之后就可以去旅行了。
content.en_text: Then you carry on to August and do your traveling after that.

content.cn_text: 所以你九月就回家了。
content.en_text: So, you're back home in September.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 太完美了。
content.en_text: [Man]: That's perfect.

content.cn_text: 嗯，这听起来都很棒。
content.en_text: Well, that all sounds great.

content.cn_text: 但关于这份工作。
content.en_text: But about the job.

content.cn_text: 我是边做边学吗？
content.en_text: Do I just pick it up as I go along?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 不。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: No.

content.cn_text: 孩子们来之前你会提前一周到达，这段时间用于培训。
content.en_text: You get there a week before the kids arrive, and that time spent on training.

content.cn_text: 所以，你将学习所有关于夏令营、与美国儿童相处以及处理思乡情绪的知识。
content.en_text: So, you'll learn all about the camp and working with American children and dealing with homesickness.

content.cn_text: 所有这些事情。
content.en_text: All that kind of thing.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Man]: Right.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 在你听对话的其余部分之前，你有一些时间查看问题6到10。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Before you hear the rest of the conversation, you have some time to look at questions 6 to 10.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题6到10。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 6 to 10.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 我想我的年龄应该没问题吧。
content.en_text: [Man]: And I presume I'd be okay as far as my age goes.

content.cn_text: 到那时我就19岁了。
content.en_text: I'll be 19 by then.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 那是官方规定的最低年龄。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: That's the minimum age officially.

content.cn_text: 虽然如果他们有特殊技能且这些技能很抢手的话，他们偶尔也会接受18岁的人。
content.en_text: Though they do occasionally accept people of 18 if they have special skills that are in demand.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 我实际能拿到多少工资呢？
content.en_text: [Man]: And how much would I actually get paid?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 你总共会得到985美元。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: You get a total of $985 US dollars.

content.cn_text: 如果你超过21岁，你会多拿到几百美元。
content.en_text: You get a couple of hundred dollars more if you're over 21.

content.cn_text: 但这不适用于你。
content.en_text: But that won't apply to you.

content.cn_text: 所以当你完成工作后，你应该会有相当一笔钱可以用来旅行。
content.en_text: So you should end up with quite a bit of money to go traveling with when you finished.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 太棒了。
content.en_text: [Man]: Great.

content.cn_text: 有很多我想看的东西。
content.en_text: That's tons I want to see.

content.cn_text: 纽约、旧金山、大峡谷。
content.en_text: New York, San Francisco, the Grand Canyon.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 但你必须在出发前支付你自己的保险费。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: But you do have to pay for your own insurance before you start out.

content.cn_text: 那费用是138英镑。
content.en_text: That costs 138 pounds sterling.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 那是为了以防我生病或其他情况吗？
content.en_text: [Man]: That's in case I get ill or anything.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 是的。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Yes.

content.cn_text: 或者你行李丢失，或者不得不取消行程。
content.en_text: Or you lose your luggage or have to cancel.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Man]: Right.

content.cn_text: 广告里还有关于某种检查的内容。
content.en_text: And there was something in the ad about a check of some kind.

content.cn_text: 因为我将和孩子们一起工作。
content.en_text: Because I'd be working with children.

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 是的，没错。
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Yes, that's right.

content.cn_text: 我忘了提那个，而且它非常重要。
content.en_text: I forgot to mention that and it's very important.

content.cn_text: 你必须在英国接受警方的检查。
content.en_text: You have to be checked by the police here in the UK.

content.cn_text: 那费用是36英镑。
content.en_text: And that costs 36 pounds.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 没关系。
content.en_text: [Man]: That's okay.

content.cn_text: 关于钱方面还有什么我应该知道的吗？
content.en_text: Is there anything else I should know as far as money goes?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 嗯，只是如果你在我们这里注册参加夏令营工作，
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Well, just that if you register with us to work on the summer camp,

content.cn_text: 你之后可以参加“探索美国”之旅。
content.en_text: you can go on and discover America tour afterwards.

content.cn_text: 很多夏令营辅导员都会这样做。
content.en_text: A lot of camp counselors do that.

content.cn_text: 我们可以为你提供折扣。
content.en_text: And we can offer you a discount on that.

content.cn_text: 当然，你肯定会交到很多朋友
content.en_text: And of course, you're bound to make lots of friends

content.cn_text: 所以你会有人一起旅行。
content.en_text: so you'll have people to travel with.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 好的。
content.en_text: [Man]: Right.

content.cn_text: 嗯，我对整个事情都非常感兴趣。
content.en_text: Well, I'm definitely interested in the whole thing.

content.cn_text: 那么接下来我该做什么呢？
content.en_text: So what should I do next?

content.cn_text: [尼古拉斯]: 嗯，我会给你我们的网站地址
content.en_text: [Nicholas]: Well, I'll give you our website address

content.cn_text: 你可以填写申请表。
content.en_text: and you can fill in the application form.

content.cn_text: 你可以在线填写。
content.en_text: You can fill it in online.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 第一部分到此结束。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: That is the end of part one.

content.cn_text: 现在你有一分钟时间检查第一部分的答案。
content.en_text: You now have one minute to check your answers to part one.

content.cn_text: [男士]: 非常感谢。
content.en_text: [Man]: Thank you very much.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 谢谢。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

content.cn_text: 谢谢。
content.en_text: Thank you.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER.
groups.title: Question 1-10.

items.title: General counsellors need experience of working with children as a 1. __________
Job in summer camp lasts for 3. __________ weeks with the chance to travel afterwards
First week of job is used for 5. __________
Officially, counsellors must be at least 6. __________ years old
Can get a 10. __________ on travel in America after camp

groups.source_collect:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER.
Working in a summer camp in the USA
• Job involves being with children for 24 hours per day
• General counsellors need experience of working with children as a $1$
• Specialist counsellors could use skills in:
• Sports, e.g. $2$
• Art
• Job in summer camp lasts for $3$ weeks with the chance to travel afterwards
• Job starts in $4$
• First week of job is used for $5$
• Officially, counsellors must be at least $6$ years old
• Salary: $7$ US $
Must pay for
• Own $8$ (£138)
• A $9$ check in UK (£36)
Can get a $10$ on travel in America after camp
